ogTitle: Campsie vs Cams Wharf: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Campsie and Cams Wharf.
heading: Campsie vs Cams Wharf — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Campsie, New South Wales and Cams Wharf, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cams Wharf has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Campsie (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Campsie or Cams Wharf safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Campsie has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Cams Wharf scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Campsie scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Cams Wharf scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Campsie or Cams Wharf?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cams Wharf has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
